product: Google Cloud Managed Service for Apache Kafka
update: Managed Service for Apache Kafka now supports topic compression with  zstd .

product: Google Cloud Managed Service for Apache Kafka
update:
The  Managed Service for Apache Kafka remote MCP server 
is  generally available  (GA).

product: Google Cloud Managed Service for Apache Kafka
update:
You can now use the
 Managed Service for Apache Kafka remote MCP server 
to enable LLM agents to create and manage your Kafka clusters and Kafka Connect
clusters, as well as create and manage related resources such as topics,
consumer groups, connectors, and ACLs. 
 This feature is in
 Preview .

product: Google Cloud Managed Service for Apache Kafka
update:
Using  gcloud  or the REST API, you can now view the following
information about a Managed Service for Apache Kafka cluster: 
 
 Broker node IDs and indexes 
 The zones where brokers are located 
 The Kafka version that the cluster is running 
 
 For more information, see
 View a Kafka cluster .

product: Google Cloud Managed Service for Apache Kafka
update:
The  additionalSubnets  field in the
 ConnectNetworkConfig 
REST API resource is deprecated. Connect cluster workers can reach any endpoint
that is accessible from  primarySubnet  subnetwork.

product: Google Cloud Managed Service for Apache Kafka
update:
Kafka Connect cluster workers can now reach any endpoint that is accessible from
the worker (primary) subnetwork. Previously, to extend worker connectivity to
other subnets within the same VPC network, you had to specify
these subnets in the cluster configuration. The  additionalSubnets  field is now
ignored, and this configuration setting has been removed from the
Google Cloud console. For more information, see
 Worker (primary) subnet .

product: Google Cloud Managed Service for Apache Kafka
update: Support for Kafka Connect is now  generally available  (GA). Kafka Connect lets you stream data at scale between Managed Service for Apache Kafka clusters and other systems, such as external Kafka deployments, BigQuery, Cloud Storage, or Pub/Sub. For more information, see  Kafka Connect overview .

product: Google Cloud Managed Service for Apache Kafka
update: Integration with  VPC Service Controls  is  generally available  (GA).

product: Google Cloud Managed Service for Apache Kafka
update: Managed Service for Apache Kafka now supports  Organization Policy Service custom constraints . Custom constraints allow you to restrict specific operations on Managed Service for Apache Kafka resources.

product: Google Cloud Managed Service for Apache Kafka
update: General availability: You can now use mutual TLS (mTLS) for certificate-based authentication with your Managed Service for Apache Kafka brokers. This feature is available for clusters created after June 24, 2025. For more information, see  Authentication types for Kafka brokers .

product: Google Cloud Managed Service for Apache Kafka
update: Integration with  VPC Service Controls  is in  preview .

product: Google Cloud Managed Service for Apache Kafka
update: Managed Service for Apache Kafka now supports  HIPAA Compliance on Google Cloud .

product: Google Cloud Managed Service for Apache Kafka
update: The Google Cloud Managed Service for Apache Kafka service creates new brokers automatically based on the memory and vCPU configuration of the cluster. When you update a cluster's size, the service now performs a safety check to verify that individual brokers have sufficient capacity for their portion of the traffic. For more information, see  Update the memory and vCPUs .

product: Google Cloud Managed Service for Apache Kafka
update: General availability: Metrics for all Google Cloud Managed Service for Apache Kafka resources are now available, with some exceptions. Exceptions include the  request_count  and  topic_error_count  metrics for Kafka clusters and Kafka Connect connectors. For a list of supported metrics, see  Metrics for Cloud Managed Service for Apache Kafka .

product: Google Cloud Managed Service for Apache Kafka
update: Public preview: Google Managed Service for Apache Kafka now offers schema registry support. For more information about the feature, see the  schema registry overview  or   get started with an Avro producer in Java .

product: Google Cloud Managed Service for Apache Kafka
update: General availability: Managed Service for Apache Kafka now supports configuring standard Apache Kafka ACLs using  REST ,  gRPC , and  gcloud CLI . For more information, see  Access control with IAM and Kafka ACLs .

product: Google Cloud Managed Service for Apache Kafka
update: Public preview:  Google Cloud Managed Service for Apache Kafka now supports Kafka Connect. Kafka Connect provides a curated set of built-in connector plugins hosted in Connect clusters. Configure these connector plugins to create connectors that let you stream data at scale between Managed Service for Apache Kafka clusters and other systems, such as external Kafka deployments, BigQuery, Cloud Storage, or Pub/Sub. For more information, see  Kafka Connect overview .

product: Google Cloud Managed Service for Apache Kafka
update: Documentation is now available to help you choose between Pub/Sub and Google Cloud Managed Service for Apache Kafka. The comparison is based on factors such as operational ease, portability, existing Kafka setup, and integration with other Google Cloud products. A detailed feature comparison table is also included. For more information, see  Choose Cloud Managed Service for Apache Kafka or Pub/Sub .

product: Google Cloud Managed Service for Apache Kafka
update: Google Cloud Managed Service for Apache Kafka now supports moving open source Kafka data to Google Cloud using various Dataflow templates. You can move Kafka data to Cloud Managed Service for Apache Kafka, BigQuery, and Cloud Storage. For more information about these data movement use cases, see  Move Kafka data in Google Cloud .

product: Google Cloud Managed Service for Apache Kafka
update: Google Cloud Managed Service for Apache Kafka is now in General Availability (GA).

product: Google Cloud Managed Service for Apache Kafka
update: Google Cloud Managed Service for Apache Kafka clusters now run on Apache Kafka version 3.7.1.

product: Google Cloud Managed Service for Apache Kafka
update: Apache Kafka for BigQuery is now called Google Cloud Managed Service for Apache Kafka.

product: Google Cloud Managed Service for Apache Kafka
update: Client library samples for Python are now added to all relevant pages. For more information, see  Apache Kafka for BigQuery client libraries .

product: Google Cloud Managed Service for Apache Kafka
update: Terraform samples are now available for creating clusters and topics. For more information, see  Provision Apache Kafka for BigQuery resources with Terraform .

product: Google Cloud Managed Service for Apache Kafka
update: Client library samples for Java and Go are now added to all relevant pages. For more information, see  Apache Kafka for BigQuery client libraries .
